title: 4PCS Large Stress Balls for Kids Adults, Ice Cube Squeeze Fidget Toy Set Colorful Squeeze Cube Sensory Squishy Toys Anxiety Relief for Children Boys Girls Men Women for Home School Office，5cm
features: 4Pcs Fidget Cube Stress Balls-You will get 4 Pcs nice cube toys in multi-colors(sent random from 8 colors),each color is bright and cute,looks like sugar. Enough quantity for sharing with families and friends

Stress Relief Toys- Our fidget toys are the perfect tool for stress relief. The soft texture of the stress ball provides a comfortable touch feeling, allowing you to release tension and anxiety through a simple squeeze,allow you calm down and release

Safe and Washable- Our sensory balls are made of rubber that is soft,durable and can be repeatedly pinched,stretched and bent. Non-toxic and odorless which is safe for kids and adults.The stress ball is easy to clean, wash with soap and water

Large Size- The fidget balls for adults is in large size :5x5x5cm/1.96x1.96x1.96inch.The large size and soft touch feeling make it feel better in your hand. Have a stress-relieving tool at hand.Say goodbye to bore and stress in your life
Ideal Gift for All Age- Squishy toy not only be a stress toy but also a cute decoration,the colorful ice cube figet toy is an ideal gift for all ages on birthday,party,Christams,halloween or new year
